---
title: "Project 2"
author: "Evan Whitfield"
format: html
---
```{r}
#Load in libraries
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(shiny)
library(DT)
library(bslib)
```


# Data Exploration


```{r}
nfl_data <- read_csv("data/NFL_play_data.csv") |>
  rename(yards_gained = Yards.Gained)
```
```{r}
dim(nfl_data)
colnames(nfl_data)
```

```{r}
play_type_table <- nfl_data |>
  count(PlayType) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Frequency of Play Types"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    PlayType = "Play Type",
    n = "Count"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) |>
  opt_row_striping()

play_type_table
```


```{r}
play_table <- nfl_data |>
  count(PlayType, down) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = down,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )

play_table
```


```{r}

```


```{r}

```
